summary: Implemented notifyFees(uint256 amount) on LPVault with onlyOperator access control, inline _mulDiv for overflow-safe Q128 arithmetic (unchecked modular inverse section), NoActiveLiquidity and ZeroAmount guards. FeesNotified event emitted. 16 tests covering all 6 scenarios including a fuzz test for mulDiv overflow safety with 257 runs. Coverage: lines 98.59%, statements 95.83%, branches 82.35%, funcs 100%. The _mulDiv helper is reusable by downstream features (collect, burn).
